description: Cross-language conformance for the engine stream LOAD settle query (the stateful half of the LOAD effect model, but pure over the breaker snapshot). The host supplies the plan it executed + the per-source outcomes + the breaker snapshot + the user's debrid services; the engine settles (a planned source missing from outcomes = Timeout; failures isolated), parses the merged items into streams, marks cached from each stream's typed cachedServices, ranks with the active (owner default) profile's prefs, and returns the ranked order + the UPDATED breaker snapshot for the host to upsert. ranked is pinned as a {raw_index, score} projection (reasons are not pinned). Owner default prefs: cached_first true.
